1Ziqi Kang, Venla Kaislo, Andreas Hainari May 28th, 2025

Meeting Agenda•Project updates •Conclude for current stage of spatial analysis •Plan for ROIs selection? Pre-experiment for Xenium? •iMTB reports return for iCAN-OVCA •Data integration & clinical analysis (Venla) •Interoperate iMTB report (Andreas) •Deconvolution of bulk RNA-seq? What will be the next step?

Ongoing steps

To describe tissue landscape: 1. Cell-cell interaction scale 2. Global immune-TSI distance 3. Immune from stroma/tumor side 4. Network structure analysis 5. Automated / semi-automated ROIs selection It’s time to gradually turn into
